name: @feed/examples
description: Feed A2A example agents, training harness, and local development server

scripts.agent:py: cd feed-langgraph-agent && uv run python local_agent.py
scripts.test:py: cd feed-langgraph-agent && uv run pytest tests/test_local_agent.py -v
scripts.harness:train: cd harness && bun run src/cli.ts train
